title: Check if Strings Can be Made Equal With Operations I
titleCn: 判断通过操作能否让字符串相等 I

testcases.input: s1 = "abcd", s2 = "cdab" Output: true Explanation: We can do the following operations on s1: - Choose the indices i = 0, j = 2. The resulting string is s1 = "cbad". - Choose the indices i = 1, j = 3. The resulting string is s1 = "cdab" = s2.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can do the following operations on s1: - Choose the indices i = 0, j = 2. The resulting string is s1 = "cbad". - Choose the indices i = 1, j = 3. The resulting string is s1 = "cdab" = s2.

testcases.input: s1 = "abcd", s2 = "dacb" Output: false Explanation: It is not possible to make the two strings equal.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is not possible to make the two strings equal.
